title: Project Management Specialist (Pharm MNC) (6 Months Contract, up to $6500) #HJOT
description:
We are hiring project management specialist to be outsourced to our clients from reputable healthcare organizations.

Apply now!

Key Responsibilities:

Job Description

Job details:

  • Develop and manage project templates, trackers, schedules, and reporting tools.

  • Ensure consistency and standardisation of project management processes.

  • Track progress across multiple projects and improvement initiatives.

  • Monitor timelines, milestones, risks, and action items.

  • Highlight and escalate risks, delays, or issues through appropriate channels.
  • Prepare clear and concise weekly and monthly project status reports.
  • Support preparation of materials for management reviews and meetings.
  • Liaise with cross-functional teams to collect updates and maintain accurate project records.
  • Support meeting coordination, including scheduling, agenda preparation, and minutes.
  • Maintain up-to-date project documentation such as plans, trackers, and meeting records.

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Operations, Business, Engineering, or equivalent relevant experience
  • Basic understanding of project management principles with strong coordination, communication, and follow-up skills
  • Comfortable working with spreadsheets, trackers, and structured reporting tools
  • Comfortable operating in a fast paced, project driven environment.
  • Hands-on experience and possesses relevant technical skills

All Interested candidates are invited to email your resume in MS Word format to:

healthscience@recruitexpress.com.sg

Please include your full working experience, education background, notice period, expected salary.

Krislyn Chng

Outsourcing Team

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

Company Reg. No. 199601303W | EA License Number: 99C4599

We regret to inform that only suitable candidates will be shortlisted for an interview.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
